summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Islamic prayer app homepage redesign. Successfully verified 'Set a location' initial view, manual location saving with Kuala Lumpur coordinates, and new homepage layout with all required components.

integration_issues.issue: Toggle text selector not found with exact 'View All' text, but functionality appears to work visually
Some feature card clicks experience overlay interception issues, but navigation ultimately succeeds

passed_tests: Homepage loads with 'Set a location' view when no location is saved
Manual location form displays with pre-filled Kuala Lumpur coordinates (3.139, 101.687)
Save manual location button successfully sets location
Wave header section renders with settings and navigation icons
Hijri date (Shawwal 24, 1447 AH) and Gregorian date (April 12, 2026) are visible
6 prayer time cards render in horizontal row (Fajr, Sunrise, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha)
Next prayer card (Fajr) has distinct highlighted styling
Feature cards (Quran, Dua Collection, Progress, Settings) are present and clickable
Stats row shows Today completion (0/5), Streak days (0), and 7-day rate (0%)
Next prayer banner displays 'Next: Fajr at 4:48 AM'
Bottom tab navigation works (Today, Quran, Duas, Progress, Settings tabs)
Settings page loads with proper configuration options
Quran page loads with search functionality and surah list
